candidate.completion: lower your standards until they make eye contact.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please lower your standards until they make eye contact.

evaluation.rationale: The line has a clear self-deprecating turn and some bite, but the logic of standards 'making eye contact' feels slightly strained rather than inevitable. It is compact and fairly memorable, yet the pivot is more vivid than exact.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please stop calling my two-person table 'optimistic seating.'
